name: goalos-agijobmanager-ascension

scripts.build: npm run bootstrap && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/release-compatibility-harmonizer-v46.mjs && node tools/run-existing-kernels.mjs && CHECK_DIST=true node tools/public-trust-checker-v46.mjs && node tools/repository-public-trust-compatibility-failsafe-v46-kernel.mjs
scripts.test: npm run bootstrap && python3 tools/verify.py && node tools/no-registry-preflight.mjs && node tools/pathspec-proof-kernel.mjs && node tools/workflow-reference-auditor.mjs && node tools/docs-link-checker.mjs && node tools/claim-boundary-checker.mjs && node tools/run-documentation-tests.mjs && node tools/public-trust-checker-v46.mjs && node tools/run-all-tests.mjs
scripts.test:strict: npm test && npm run assurance && npm run factual && npm run build && npm run legal && npm run token-boundary
scripts.test:zero-network: node tools/site-rehydrate.mjs && node tools/no-registry-preflight.mjs && node tools/pathspec-proof-kernel.mjs && node tools/run-documentation-tests.mjs && node tools/run-all-tests.mjs && node tools/run-existing-kernels.mjs
scripts.flight-deck: node tests/ascension-flight-deck.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/ascension-flight-deck-kernel.mjs
scripts.evidence-docket-composer: node tests/evidence-docket-composer.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/evidence-docket-composer-kernel.mjs
scripts.trust-equation: node tests/trust-equation-simulator.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/trust-equation-simulator-kernel.mjs
scripts.command-center: node tests/website-command-center.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/website-command-center-kernel.mjs
scripts.experience-hub: node tests/experience-hub.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/experience-hub-kernel.mjs
scripts.test:navigation: node tests/navigation-atlas.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/navigation-atlas-kernel.mjs
scripts.site-atlas: node tests/site-experience-atlas.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/site-experience-atlas-kernel.mjs
scripts.site-command-center: node tests/site-command-center.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/site-command-center-kernel.mjs
scripts.navigation-final: node tests/navigation-system-final.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/navigation-system-final-kernel.mjs
scripts.test:navigation-final: node tests/navigation-system-final.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/navigation-system-final-kernel.mjs
scripts.navigation-polish-v41: node tests/navigation-polish-v41.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/navigation-polish-v41-kernel.mjs
scripts.test:navigation-polish: node tests/navigation-polish-v41.test.mjs && python3 tools/build.py && node tools/navigation-polish-v41-kernel.mjs
scripts.bootstrap: node tools/failsafe-bootstrap-v46.mjs && node tools/site-rehydrate.mjs && node tools/root-cleanup-v46.mjs && node tools/apply-public-trust-metadata-v46.mjs
scripts.verify:public-trust: node tools/failsafe-bootstrap-v46.mjs && node tools/run-documentation-tests.mjs && node tools/public-trust-checker-v46.mjs

description: GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension public proof institution with v42/v43/v44/v45/v46-compatible GitHub Pages publication, guarded documentation tests, canonical route manifest, social metadata, public-trust QA, clean repository root, and public-safe browser-local demos.
